verified.notes: Washington State operates multiple Home Delivered Meals programs through different counties and providers. Age requirement of 60 is consistent across Pierce County, Snohomish County, and O3A regional programs (with 55+ for American Indian/Alaska Native). Phone number is for Pierce County Catholic Community Services program. Income limits exist in some programs (O3A: 185% Federal Poverty Level) but are not universally applied across all Washington HDM programs. No asset limits found in search results. Program appears active as of April 2026 with ongoing RFPs for service contracts.
